+空间+多只宠物+囤货+日常+不一样的空间系统！）
酸雨，暴雪，极寒极热，虫灾，变异……
孤身在末世挣扎十年，却被人陷害放血惨死。
重来一世，她复仇、囤货、养变异大军犬！
炸鸡、螺蛳粉、可乐、薯片全都买买买！
只是……空间的升级方向，好像有些奇怪……
“垃圾处理机”放进去的是生活垃圾，吐出来的是随机物资？
“爱心养殖场”随心情变幻动物，今天的竟然是……大象？
“开心农场”看着没什么问题，为什么会长出来发电机？
……
待到末日降临，她左撸狗，右拿冰激凌，脚下是空间随机吐出来的按摩仪。
就算是末日来临，生活也要有仪式感！
清醒大女主，在末世一往直前乘风破浪！
前期男主工具人，感情线极少，但两人互动颇有意思。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/275231e83b08d4f0ea305d27ab5b2e73","author":"二两空语","author_id":"","book_id":"7155747153141304355","book_name":"囤亿万物资坐等天灾，她天选女主","book_short_name":"灾星异变","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":523,"name":"前世今生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=523&name=前世今生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7155748384291160611","read_count":"36707","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1221453"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"564","tags":"科幻末世,重生,空间,末世,囤物资,前世今生,天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/fe966c6aa3bd7797bb615ca30fb23417~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779308459&x-signature=zWxQgPPdN8XcA65ctLWD8MBFo5M%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4318486060075063","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9.79922e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322042059A4EEB3989A2521B61C62"}"},"relate_in
